name: orbit-lifecycle-system
display_name: Orbit - Lifecycle Marketing System for Claude
description: Claude-first lifecycle marketing router, brand-kit intake system, setup validator, prompt kit, skill manifest, and visual tooling built from Orbit's 31 protocols.
long_description: Orbit gives Claude a local lifecycle marketing operating system. It routes requests to the right Orbit protocol, exposes the full skill library as resources, loads a canonical skill manifest for routing and validation, drafts and writes standardized local brand kits with brand-profile.json plus brand-guidelines.md, validates local setup and brand kits, generates lifecycle program diagrams as deterministic SVG/PNG/PDF exports, and builds brand-safe email header assets using Nano Banana Pro for art generation with local composition for logos and layout.

company_name.title: Company Name
company_name.description: Optional default company or brand name used in Orbit outputs.

default_platform.title: Default Platform
default_platform.description: Optional default lifecycle platform, such as braze, iterable, or hubspot.

default_geography.title: Default Geography
default_geography.description: Optional default geography or market for compliance-aware recommendations.

brand_kit_dir.title: Brand Kit Directory
brand_kit_dir.description: Optional folder that contains brand-profile.json and official logo/example assets.

default_output_dir.title: Default Output Directory
default_output_dir.description: Optional folder where Orbit should save rendered diagrams and brand assets.

google_ai_api_key.title: Google AI API Key
google_ai_api_key.description: Optional Google AI Studio key used for Nano Banana Pro image generation.

tools.name: orbit_list_skills
tools.description: List the Orbit skills by category or surface the whole library.

tools.name: orbit_route_task
tools.description: Rank the best-fit Orbit skills for a request and identify the missing disambiguators.

tools.name: orbit_load_skill
tools.description: Load an Orbit skill in summary or full mode.

tools.name: orbit_get_template
tools.description: Fetch a reusable Orbit template or output format.

tools.name: orbit_compose_sequence
tools.description: Suggest a multi-skill Orbit workflow for a goal.

tools.name: orbit_validate_output
tools.description: Run a structural validation pass on a draft against an Orbit skill.

tools.name: orbit_check_setup
tools.description: Run an Orbit healthcheck for config, output paths, brand kits, and image-generation readiness.

tools.name: orbit_validate_brand_kit
tools.description: Validate brand-profile.json, brand-guidelines.md, logo paths, example assets, and preferred layout settings.

tools.name: orbit_build_brand_kit_draft
tools.description: Create a reviewable brand-kit draft with brand-profile.json, brand-guidelines.md, and a normalized asset plan.

tools.name: orbit_write_brand_kit
tools.description: Write an approved brand-kit draft to disk and copy normalized logo/example assets into the standard folder structure.

tools.name: orbit_update_brand_guidelines
tools.description: Update draft or existing brand-guidelines.md content without a full brand-kit re-intake.

tools.name: orbit_build_lifecycle_diagram_spec
tools.description: Create a canonical lifecycle diagram spec with nodes, edges, platform badges, and Mermaid output.

tools.name: orbit_update_lifecycle_diagram_spec
tools.description: Apply deterministic revisions to an existing lifecycle diagram spec.

tools.name: orbit_render_lifecycle_diagram
tools.description: Render a lifecycle diagram spec to SVG, PNG, and PDF.

tools.name: orbit_build_brand_header_spec
tools.description: Create a review-ready brand header spec with deterministic layout and Nano Banana Pro art prompting.

tools.name: orbit_update_brand_header_spec
tools.description: Apply deterministic revisions to an existing brand header spec.

tools.name: orbit_render_brand_header
tools.description: Render a brand header spec into SVG, PNG, and PDF assets with local logo composition.
